plan: Extract per-mock structural and typographic deltas by comparing each rendered Storybook mock surface to project/preview counterparts.
Refine shared mockup page shells (tabs/casing/page headers/chapter rhythm) and page-specific sections in src/mockups/MockupPreviews.tsx.
Tighten style fidelity in src/mockups/mockups.css for exact spacing scales, panel geometry, borders, gradients, and typography sizes against each mock family.
Keep story controls and example app parity untouched except for any required consumption adjustments.
Run deterministic gates: mockup coverage check, lint, build, storybook build, and example build. Iterate one additional repair pass if any gates fail or fidelity review notes remain high-severity.
runtimeCallPaths: project/preview/*.html -> visual reference for typography rhythm, spacing cadence, casing chrome, and layout proportions only
verificationNotes: Every mock family (Ads, Brand, Chat, Colors, Components, Dashboard, Docs, Spacing, Type) must remain represented in shared source and Storybook stories.
Storybook mock pages must render without missing routes/assets and stay fully local (no external iframe dependency).
Fidelity checks focus on layout structure, type scale, spacing rhythm, casing/tab chrome, and color contrast alignment to project/preview sources.
Example app must continue consuming the same shared mockup surfaces and controls for parity with Storybook.
